insight: Immolites make Valk (Valkyrie) significantly better; the line DD/DDC/DDB/DA+Oxide/Valk+Immolite sets up a threatening and clean build, with the option to take Shredder or Wall over Oxide+Drone on turn 4.
author: leary93
context: Analysis of a Thunderhead game discussing alternative strategic lines involving Valk and Immolites.

insight: Colossus requires heavy tech investment (~20 gold in tech buildings plus at minimum ~15 drones to operate), and once the supply runs out, you need ~20 drones minimum to sustain, making it awkward without a tech fix or gold sink. Despite this, P2 can potentially go Colossus in base set plus one expansion, though it may be too slow (too 'clunky') to be viably BSO.
author: leary93
context: Discussion of Colossus viability in BSO and broader strategic contexts, prompted by Shadourow's questions about the unit.

insight: Tactics-heavy positions (e.g., Elyot Animus lines) are described as the bot's strongest point, implying Master Bot handles tactical exchanges better than strategic/economic planning in complex sets.
author: namington
context: Discussion of whether Elyot Animus was viable for a new player against bot opponents; namington noted tactics are where bots are strongest.
